name: coconut sugar
description: A natural sweetener derived from coconut sap that provides sweetness with mild caramel notes.
raw_text: Coco sans sucres: Eau, noix de coco 4%, eau de coco 4%, amidon de riz*, arômes naturels de coco*, stabilisants: gomme guar*, gomme gellane, sel marin. *Ingrédients biologiques | Labels: en:low-or-no-sugar, en:organic, en:eu-organic, en:non-eu-agriculture, en:certified-b-corporation | Coconut And Rice Milk: water, 5.3% coconut milk (coconut cream, water), 3.3% rice, sea salt, natural coconut flavor, stabilizers: guar gum, gellan gum, xanthan gum, | Labels: en:organic, en:vegetarian, en:eu-organic, en:vegan, en:european-vegetarian-union | Fermented Coconut Yoghurt Alternative: Coconut Milk, Coconut Water, Corn Flour, Corn Fibre, Potato Flour, Fruit Pectin, Cultures (Streptococcus Thermophilus, Lactobacillus Bulgaricus, Lactobacillus Acidophilus, Bifidobacterium Lactis) | Labels: en:low-or-no-sugar, en:vegetarian, en:low-sugar, en:no-artificial-flavors, en:no-artificial-sweeteners
